free_text: Formation of residual nuclei with medium mass number
in the reaction of protons with separated tin isotopes
Subentries 087,093,094 were deleted as duplication in
Two Irradiations were carried during 27 and
5 minutes.  At the synchrophasotron two irradiation
were also carried out by proton beams with energy 1.0
and 8.1 GeV during 1.0 and 0.6 hours, respectively.
.The Uncertainty is reported by authors. Any
*By Authors*. The Isotopes in the mass region 42<A<67
at the proton energy 1 GeV are not observed in all
targets.  They are not observed at the proton energy
0.66 GeV although the beam intensity at this energy is
three order of magnitude higher either than 8.1 GeV.
This means that their cross-sections at the lower
energy were very smaller and increased sharply at 8.1
